title: Over Nine Thousand Toasters: Spaghetti (Part 1 of 3)
description:
"Over Nine Thousand Toasters" is back in a long-awaited epic trilogy!  Only, part 1 isn't very epic at all... it's mostly just character development and gratuitous one-liners.  In any case, part 1 explains all the relevant backstory from the original trilogy, so newcomers to the series won't get lost!  Only, the story makes very little sense, if any... it's more or less a bunch of random crap that happens for no reason.  Enjoy!

Credits:

Made with Acid, Sony Vegas, Flash, GIMP, and Audacity.

Music:
- Various songs from Final Fantasy VI, composed by Nobuo Uematsu
- Orchestrated version of Kefka theme from Final Fantasy VI (don't know who to credit yet, need to look this one up!)
- Title screen song from Metroid Prime
